name: Mimikatz Execution Detection
description: Detection of Mimikatz tool execution, often used for credential dumping, indicating a potential severe compromise.

parameters.name: ComputerName
parameters.description: The hostname where Mimikatz execution was detected.

parameters.name: SubjectUserName
parameters.description: The username under which Mimikatz was executed.

parameters.name: NewProcessName
parameters.description: The name of the new process created (Mimikatz).

parameters.name: CommandLine
parameters.description: The full command line used to execute Mimikatz.
